message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Extend the confidentiality obligations beyond two years.",
      "leverage": "Longer confidentiality periods are common in industries where sensitive information is shared.",
      "proposed_language": "These confidentiality obligations shall survive for a period of five (5) years after the termination of this Agreement.",
      "rationale": "Extending the confidentiality period protects both parties' sensitive information for a longer duration, which is crucial in competitive industries.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "objective": "Clarify the definition of Confidential Information.",
      "leverage": "A clear definition helps prevent misunderstandings and disputes regarding what constitutes confidential information.",
      "proposed_language": "Confidential Information shall also include any information that is marked as confidential or that is disclosed in a manner that indicates its confidential nature.",
      "rationale": "This clarification ensures both parties have a mutual understanding of what information is protected, reducing the risk of inadvertent disclosures.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "objective": "Limit the indemnification clause to direct damages only.",
      "leverage": "Limiting indemnification to direct damages is a common practice that reduces potential liability exposure.",
      "proposed_language": "Each party shall indemnify and hold harmless the other party from and against any direct claims, damages, and losses arising out of a breach of this Agreement by the indemnifying party.",
      "rationale": "This change minimizes the financial risk for both parties and aligns with standard industry practices.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "objective": "Modify the limitation of liability clause to include a cap on indirect damages.",
      "leverage": "Capping indirect damages provides clarity and limits exposure for both parties.",
      "proposed_language": "Neither party shall be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of this Agreement, except for damages arising from willful misconduct or gross negligence.",
      "rationale": "This ensures that both parties are protected from excessive liability while still holding them accountable for serious breaches.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "objective": "Specify the governing law to allow for flexibility in jurisdiction.",
      "leverage": "Choosing a more neutral governing law can facilitate a fairer resolution process.",
      "proposed_language": "This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California or any other mutually agreed jurisdiction.",
      "rationale": "This flexibility can help in case of disputes, allowing for a more favorable legal environment for both parties.",
      "priority": "low",
      "confidence": 0.6
    }
  ]
}
